description: Colour block sneakers from roxy give a high-fashion spin to your off-duty wardrobe. Wear this with a tonal T-shirt, skinny jeans and a structured blazer.UpperFabric upper for with suede overlaysEmbroidery and graphic print on the overlaysCentral lace upsPadded tonguePadded insole for instep comfortMidsolePU midsole with double foxing for the toe boxOutsoleRubber outsole with exaggerated herringboneshoe careDo not store in direct sunlight
